---
title: "Clinical Data Programming"
subtitle: "CDISC · ADaM · TLFs · R Pharmaverse"
categories: [R, Pharma, CDISC, Shiny]
date: 2026-04-25
---

## Overview

*Project coming soon — using CDISC pilot public dataset.*

## Skills demonstrated

-   ADaM dataset creation with `admiral`
-   TLF generation with `rtables` / `gt`
-   Safety reporting with `Teal` / `Shiny`
-   CDISC SDTM & ADaM standards
